ab: Kana ita mnswayi, prajing ta da.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.

ab: Hiyug kana! Thmuku!
en: A: Please stand up! Salute!

ab: Embiyax su hug? Emptgsa
en: B: Hello.

ab: Tluung.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: Kana laqi,. jiyax sayang ptgsa ku munan shuya rmngaw kari Seejiq ka uuqun.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的賽德克語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Sederik.

ab: Klaun namu qmbahang kari emptgsa hug?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: Emptgsa, ini mu klai qmbahang. Tduwa su emkingal rmngaw duri hug?
ch: B:老師，我聽不懂。您可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: Ini mu qbhangi, kparu hari ka hnang su hug?
ch: B:我聽不到，您講大聲一點好嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: Qita hini! Purug knan txal duri.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: Kiya! Malu balay ka snpug su.
en: Yes! You read that very well.

ab: Spug txal duri Kparu hari ka hnang.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: Iya squwaq!
en: Don’t talk.

ab: Ngali ka patas.
en: A: Please take out your textbook.

ab: Iq wa! Emptgsa.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: Ngali ka ppatas.
en: A: Please take out your pen.

ab: Emptgsa, wada ku smhungi madas ppatas da.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: Ngali ka ssrus.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: Emptgsa, wada ku smhungi madas ssrus da.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: Kbarux ssrus siyaw thiyan su smluhay.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: Kbrxi ku ssrus hug?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: Malax nami muyas patas da.
en: Class is over.

ab: Dhuq hini ka slhayan ta han, strung ta babaw duri.
ch: 我們就先學習到這邊，我們下次再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next time.
